mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS paper_id, p.paper_name, p.duration, p.total_score, p.pass_score, p.start_time, p.end_time, er.id AS exam_id, er.status AS exam_status FROM exam_system.paper p LEFT JOIN exam_record er ON er.paper_id = p.id AND er.student_id = #{studentId} WHERE p.status = 1 AND #{now} BETWEEN p.start_time AND p.end_time ORDER BY p.start_time DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_system.exam_record (student_id, paper_id, start_time, total_score, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{paperId}, #{startTime}, #{totalScore}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT q.id AS question_id, q.question_type, q.title, q.option_a, q.option_b, q.option_c, q.option_d, pq.question_score, pq.sort_order FROM exam_system.exam_record er JOIN exam_system.paper_question pq ON er.paper_id = pq.paper_id JOIN exam_system.question q ON pq.question_id = q.id WHERE er.id = #{examId} AND er.student_id = #{studentId} AND q.status = 1 ORDER BY pq.sort_order ASC, pq.id ASC

SELECT pq.id, pq.paper_id, pq.question_id, q.question_type, q.title, q.option_a, q.option_b, q.option_c, q.option_d, q.correct_answer, q.analysis, pq.question_score, pq.sort_order, q.difficulty, q.knowledge_point FROM exam_system.paper_question pq JOIN exam_system.question q ON pq.question_id = q.id WHERE pq.paper_id = #{paperId} AND q.status = 1 ORDER BY pq.sort_order ASC, pq.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_system.exam_record SET total_score = #{totalScore}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, status = 1 WHERE id = #{examId} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT exam_id, student_id, student_name, paper_id, paper_name, total_score, pass_score, submit_time, is_pass FROM exam_system.v_student_score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC, exam_id DESC
SELECT question_id, question_title_snapshot, option_snapshot, student_answer, correct_answer_snapshot, is_correct, score FROM exam_system.answer_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY id ASC
